name: QA 964
description:
PCP QA Test No. 964

Ensure pmlogger not (re)started via PMDA Install.



We cannot use a PMDA that _might_ provide metrics that the primary

pmlogger is logging ... when we Remove that PMDA, then pmlogger will

at some point notice the metrics have gone away and exit ... leaving

no pmlogger to be tested in this test case.



So we use the test_perl PMDA.



Copyright (c) 2015-2016 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora34-container reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 964.out.bad)
21c21,22
< Found same primary pmlogger
---
> Found new primary pmlogger
> Error: PID changed from 958255 to 962855
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h e9a5ee16573f -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h e9a5ee16573f -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h e9a5ee16573f -f simple.numfetch
